summary: Family members of Blake Zieto speak against a black backdrop, holding the person's photo and 'Justice for Blake' buttons, with one cutaway to a mantel of family photos. They state that Blake was killed in 2006 by an illegal-alien hit-and-run driver and ask for tips on the suspect. A tip line, 866-347-2423, appears on screen. The video consists of spoken testimony with no music track.
